headline: CDW (CDW): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, CDW’s stock price fell to $130.14. Shareholders have lost 10.3% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 9.3%. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
